tagline: Expert Landscaping, Tree Care & Arborist Services in the Hudson Valley

hero.headline:
41 Years Transforming Hudson Valley
Landscapes
hero.subheadline: Your property deserves more than just a mow-and-go crew. Since 1985, Red Cedar Landscapes has been designing, building, and caring for landscapes and trees across the Hudson Valley — with certified arborists, advanced crane technology, and a commitment to craftsmanship that shows in every project.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Landscape & Tree Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Every Property
services.subtitle: From custom landscape design to emergency tree removal, our certified team handles it all. One company, one call — your entire property cared for by experts.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Custom landscape designs brought to life with expert craftsmanship. Patios, walkways, gardens, and outdoor living spaces tailored to your Hudson Valley property.

cards.title: Tree Service & Removal
cards.description: ISA Certified Arborists handle everything from precision pruning to large-tree removal using advanced crane technology. Safe, efficient, and damage-free.

cards.title: Landscape Construction
cards.description: Professional hardscaping including stone walls, retaining walls, patios, and drainage solutions. Built to last with quality materials and decades of experience.

cards.title: Plant Healthcare & Pest Management
cards.description: Proactive diagnosis and treatment of tree diseases and pest infestations. We protect your landscape investment with science-backed care programs.

cards.title: Landscape Maintenance
cards.description: Year-round property maintenance including seasonal cleanups, mulching, pruning, and regular upkeep. Your landscape stays pristine every season.

cards.title: Land Clearing & Stump Removal
cards.description: Efficient land clearing for new construction or development, plus professional stump grinding to restore your yard after tree removal.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your property and vision. Our certified team will visit, assess your landscape, and provide an honest, detailed estimate — no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Design & Execute Your Plan
steps.description: Our ISA Certified Arborists and landscape professionals create a custom plan for your property. From design to build, we handle every detail with 41 years of expertise.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Transformed Property
steps.description: Sit back and enjoy a property that looks stunning year-round. With ongoing maintenance options and expert tree care, your landscape investment is always protected.

about.label: Why Hudson Valley Trusts Red Cedar
about.headline: Four Decades of Craftsmanship, Not Shortcuts
about.description: Since 1985, Red Cedar Landscapes has been the Hudson Valley's trusted name in landscape design, construction, and professional tree care. Our team includes ISA Certified Arborists and Certified Treecare Safety Professionals who bring real expertise — not guesswork — to every project. We maintain an A+ BBB rating because we treat every property like our own, whether it's a backyard makeover or a 60-foot tree removal by crane.

features.title: Certified & Fully Insured
features.description: ISA Certified Arborists, CTSP professionals, BBB A+ rated, and fully licensed and insured. Your property is in qualified hands.

features.title: Advanced Crane Technology
features.description: We use specialized crane equipment for large and complex tree removals — safer, faster, and with zero damage to your property.

features.title: One Company, Full Service
features.description: Landscape design, hardscaping, tree care, and ongoing maintenance — all under one roof. No juggling multiple contractors.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just honest pricing from a company that has been here for 41 years.

guarantee.headline: Our "Craftsmanship" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any work we perform, we will return and make it right at no additional cost. We have built our reputation over four decades on standing behind every project — from a simple pruning job to a full landscape transformation. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my project?
faqs.answer: Most consultations are scheduled within a week, and project timelines depend on scope. For emergency tree situations — storm damage, hazardous limbs — we offer priority same-day or next-day response. Call us and we will work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Do you handle both landscaping and tree work?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are a full-service company with dedicated landscape designers and ISA Certified Arborists on staff. Whether you need a new patio, a complete yard renovation, or a large tree removed by crane, one call handles it all.

faqs.question: Are your arborists actually certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team includes ISA Certified Arborists and a Certified Treecare Safety Professional (CTSP) through the Tree Care Industry Association. We also maintain an A+ BBB rating and carry full liability insurance.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Dutchess, Putnam, Ulster, Orange, and Westchester Counties in New York, plus Fairfield County in Connecticut. That includes Wappingers Falls, Poughkeepsie, Fishkill, Beacon, Rhinebeck, and surrounding Hudson Valley communities.

faqs.question: Do you work with commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Yes. We serve residential, commercial, and government facilities. From corporate campuses to municipal properties, our team has the equipment and expertise to handle projects of any scale.

testimonials.name: Happy Homeowner
testimonials.text: Extremely happy and impressed with the service, the workers, and the process. Workers were courteous, professional, and creative. I immediately referred them to my next door neighbor who had an equally positive experience.

testimonials.name: Backyard Client
testimonials.text: Red Cedar is very professional, very reliable and easy to work with. They re-graded my backyard, built stone walls and were able to solve some grading and slope challenges other landscape architects could not.

testimonials.name: Tree Service Client
testimonials.text: They were on time and did great work. Very professional. Outstanding customer service. I would definitely recommend them and will use them for all future landscaping and tree projects.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Hudson Valley Property?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure consultation from our certified team. We will visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide an honest estimate — no obligations.
